metadata.name: Handle a Property Damage Claim from a Third Party

description: A person claims your insured driver backed into their car in a parking lot and is filing a claim against your insured's policy.

nodes.task_description: Gather information from the third-party claimant and identify your insured's policy.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster creates a new claim and links it to the correct policyholder.

nodes.task_description: Contact the insured policyholder to get their statement about the incident.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster speaks with the insured, who confirms they did back into the other car.

nodes.task_description: Accept liability and arrange for an appraiser to inspect the claimant's vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster accepts liability and schedules an inspection of the third-party's vehicle.
